title: AutoClicker Mod
description: is a client-side mod that allows automatic holding of the left or right mouse button in Minecraft.
body:
## AutoClicker Mod
(**1.20.x, Forge**) is a client-side mod that allows automatic holding of the left or right mouse button in Minecraft. This mod is perfect for:

- Breaking blocks without manually holding the mouse button.
- Placing blocks or using items automatically.
- Attacking mobs or players in singleplayer (or on allowed servers).


### Key Features:

- Toggle the autoclicker ON/OFF with F6.
- Select which button to auto-click: left (break/attack) or right (use/place) using the command:

```
/autoclick left
/autoclick right
```

- Automatically holds the selected button while the mod is active.
- Always displays the status (ON/OFF) in the top-left corner of the screen.
- Lightweight and easy to use with Forge 1.20.x, no extra libraries required.


_**Note: This is a client-side mod only. Using it on some servers may be prohibited.**_
